judgment.summary: A high-growth semiconductor leader with elite margins and massive free cash flow generation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS 3.49 beat the 3.33 estimate (4.7% surprise), with the next earnings date on 2026-07-16.
positives: Forward P/E 20.99 vs trailing 34.76 — attractive valuation relative to future earnings.
Earnings growth 58.4% and revenue growth 35.1% — rapid business expansion.
Gross margin 61.9% and profit margin 46.5% — exceptional operational efficiency.
Free cash flow (TTM) $721.56B — massive liquidity and capital flexibility.
negatives: Price/Book 61.95 — very high premium relative to book value.
Beta 1.26 — higher volatility compared to the broader market.

news.paragraph: TSM is facing sector-wide selling pressure as inflation concerns and rising yields drive a downturn in semiconductor and tech stocks. While the company has expressed optimism that the chip boom is just beginning, recent news highlights significant outflows from major investors and broader market volatility. Traders should consider these macroeconomic headwinds when evaluating current price action.
